rules.reason: this project uses Bun, not npm. Use Bun equivalents: `bun add`, `bun remove`, `bun run`, `bun install` (see skill: bun)
`bun test` invokes Bun's built-in test runner, not Vitest. Use `bun vitest run` instead (see skill: vitest)
this project uses uv. Use uv equivalents: `uv run`, `uv add`, `uv remove`, `uv sync` (see skill: uv)
`.` without `path:` prefix only includes tracked files. Use `path:.` instead (see skill: nix-flakes)
VCS internals — direct modification can corrupt history. Use git/jj commands instead
VCS internals — direct access can corrupt history. Use git/jj commands instead
permanent file deletion. Use `trash` instead for recoverable removal
elevated privileges. Verify root access is needed
arbitrary code execution via shell pipe. Review the content
destructive disk operation. Verify the target device
recursive or permissive permission change. Verify the path and mode
lock files are auto-generated. Edit the manifest instead and run the package manager to regenerate
skipped tests create blind spots. Fix, delete, or use `it.todo()` instead (see skill: vitest)
disabling lint rules hides issues. Fix the code or use inline `eslint-disable-next-line` with justification (see skill: eslint)
long-running server that blocks the terminal. Run in tmux instead (see skill: tmux)
`vitest` without `run` starts watch mode. Use `bun vitest run` (see skill: vitest)
`vitest` without `run` starts watch mode. Use `bun vitest run` (see skill: vitest)
watch mode blocks the terminal. Use `tsc --noEmit` or run in tmux (see skill: tmux)
interactive REPL/shell that blocks the terminal. Use non-interactive alternatives
interactive REPL that blocks the terminal. Use `-e` flag to evaluate inline
this project uses Jujutsu, not Git. Use jj equivalents (see skill: jujutsu)
Jujutsu uses `-` for parent syntax, not `~` or `^`. Use `@-`, `@--` (see skill: jujutsu)
interactive or destructive jj command. Inspect with `jj st`/`jj diff`/`jj log` first (see skill: jujutsu)
opens an editor without `-m`. Use non-interactive form with `-m 'message'` (see skill: jujutsu)
opens a merge tool UI. Use `jj resolve --list` first, then edit files directly (see skill: jujutsu)
interactive flags open editors/TUIs. Use non-interactive alternatives (see skill: jujutsu)
pushing to remote. Verify the target branch and remote
pushing to remote. Verify the target branch and remote
use Podman instead of Docker (see skill: podman)
this project uses TypeScript. Create `.ts` files instead

rules.pattern: modal {app stop,app rollback,container stop,volume delete,volume rm,dict delete,dict clear,queue delete,queue clear,secret delete,environment delete} *
rules.reason: destructive Modal operation. Verify the target resource before proceeding
destructive Zuplo operation. Verify the target resource before proceeding

rules.pattern: gh {repo delete,repo archive,repo rename,release delete,issue delete,gist delete,run delete,label delete,secret delete,variable delete} *
rules.reason: destructive GitHub operation. Use the GitHub web UI or pi's built-in gh tools
curl is sending data to an external server. Verify the destination and payload
